attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age INFERRED as ~72 (older_adult) — the source note states only 'older adult' and gives no explicit age; clinician to confirm.
Sex INFERRED as male — the source note does not record sex; only a 'spouse' is mentioned. No clinical signal; flagged for confirmation.
Geographic context INFERRED as RA1_major_city — source note gives only 'Private residence' with no remoteness signal (after-hours home telehealth); clinician to confirm.

Telehealth reprojection applied: in-person clinician actions (cardiac auscultation of a fixed split S2, arranging a 12-lead ECG and cardiac biomarkers, ambulance dispatch) reprojected to the AI-appropriate action — recognise the red flags and escalate (000) with strict rest. Auscultation and the ECG/troponin are sealed as clinician-only findings in nodes 10/11.

Baseline tier set to T5 (000/ambulance) to match the source note's ambulance dispatch and the true acuity — recurrent exertional presyncope plus possible ACS in an older adult, with the dangerous mimics not excludable remotely. minimum_viable_tier_for_pass set to T4 (emergency department) as the lowest safe pass.

Home vital-sign readings (BP 135/85, HR 68, SpO2 97%, temp 36.5) reprojected to 01.objective_data_offered as patient_home_device strings (verbatim, verified:false) — patient-obtainable via home BP monitor/oximeter/thermometer.
case_id SEQ is provisional (SPEC-CARD-04-00210) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-CARD-04 bucket; ingest --reseq assigns the real sequence.
Candidate codes assigned from model knowledge only — all carry verification_status unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; none is confirmed against a live terminology server.
No dose synthesised: perindopril dose not stated in source and left as 'as currently prescribed'; no new acute drug dose invented by the AI Doctor.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
